overview: A production-grade AI-powered fraud detection platform that analyzes banking transactions in real time using weighted ML scoring. Users submit transaction details and instantly receive a fraud risk score, confidence level, and explainable AI reasons. The system tracks all transactions per user, provides a visual dashboard with charts, and includes a model performance analytics page.
features: Real-time transaction fraud checker with risk score and confidence level
Explainable AI showing top reasons for fraud detection (unusual amount, new location, off-hours)
Fraud Risk Dashboard with bar and pie charts
Transaction history table with filters and sorting
Model performance page with accuracy, precision, recall, F1, and confusion matrix
Internet Identity login with per-user transaction isolation
Weighted ML scoring engine (amount 30%, location 25%, time 15%, frequency 20%, device 10%)
